title: More And Ore
description: More And Ore Contains an increasing amount of Content, Beginning with Ores and Items as well as Various Armors, Tools and Weapons, as well as Exponential amounts of New Features, Mobs, Bosses and Difficulty increasing Modifications!
body:
This Mod Requires CuriosApi

More and Ore is a content Mod which heavily introduced New ores and Tiers of Metal to be used by the Player to Provide Longer and More Linear post-Diamond/Netherite content, However in Pair with this the Mod adds Various Monsters and Creatures To account for the Increased Power of the Player. As Well as this the Mod includes an Overhaul to the Vanilla Progression, Placing a Powerful yet Stalwart Foe in the Midst, Sealing off the Surface from Accessing the Deepslate Caverns bellow.
![Display of Ores, Amber and Armors, as well as a Shrined Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18709e8ef6ec04c7a810c6537ad64ef090a0eb4d.png)
More and Ore Will also in the Future Overhaul the Mob Spawning System to Provide some Interest in the Midst of Progression, However currently the Mod Adds 2 Tiers of Elite Mobs and 2 Enabled World States, Enabled By Defeating Bosses. Elite Mobs have their own titles and Special abilities Derived from their representative Spiritual Being, bearing the Elements of Fire, Ice and Earth for Tier 1 and Lightning and Giant Aspects in Tier 2. On the other Hand the 'Blood Moon' World state enables the spawning of Stronger and Advanced Undead, New Mobs with their own Unique Gimmicks, Unlocked through Defeating the Blood Moon Boss.
![A Minor Majority of the Entities, Foes and Bosses Seen In More and Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaef0d0da6dd84e01bc539d934f8c6a8d1796a42_0.webp)
The Mod Also Adds Various Curio items with Passive and Active Abilities, Ranging from items that increase Stats or Provide Buffs, to ones with Movement Focused Kits and Set Bonuses When The Full Set is Equipped. As Well as This Enhancing the Visual Peculiarity and Choice of Vanity to Players Through various Changes.
![A Tree in Display of A Somewhat Progressive List of Curious items of Different Origin And Matter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95ded1619d70343aa05e8fe9ff1f915f1e4dd3ab.png)
It is also noteworthy that various functions can be changed in the Gamerules for More and Ore. Such as the new generation, disabling and enabling if bosses spawn with their own arena, if boss summoning items are lost when used as well as a new feature to play around, one which hopefully slows progression to keep some sense of progression.
![Gamerules](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786616a6d7ded4156b91aed0d75972b14ba2d36d.png)


<details>
<summary>Progression</summary>

Progression Guide For the time Being:
* Base progression up until Iron tools and Armor
  * You will find other ores and metals, tools and equippment that can make equivalent use
* At this point you would encounter the Amber Layer, to Breach it you will require diamond tools and the Trust of the Amber Lord,
  * To gain the trust of the amber lord you will need to defeat Kismet in combat, summoned using the Amber Chalice
  * It is suggested to take with you full iron armor, shields, iron weapons or those seized from locked chests opened from the keys obtained from bathyst frog eaters
  * While Diamonds are rare, they do have a variant that spawns in amber so if you have major skill issues and trouble when facing Kismet, it is possible to obtain diamond tools, armor, enchantments and if you are willing to go far enough even Netherite.
  * It is also possible to find Suspicious Dirt occasionally on the surface, right click to collect from it a random array of items. From those items is a worm scarf curio that provides resistance.
* Once Kismet has been defeated, you can equip the trust of the amber lord curio and gain access to everything bellow the thick layer of Amber at y0
* The Next suggested steps are to collect Cobalt dust from Cobalt ore and Asphatlos, using a diamond pickaxe. Cobalt functionally is on the same level as Netherite and is certainly required to not suffer the wrath of the creatures down there. Asphatalos is just better coal, but be aware that it may explode sometimes or turn into poison gas ~
* Mithril is the next level in progression. It can be collected using a Cobalt or Netherite pickaxe. This stage is less brutal than the previous as you should be used to the mobs that spawn in the Caverns and if you have been brave enough perhaps you would have gone to the White Floor
  * In the White Floor of the world generate various devestating dungeons but most importantly Adamantite, the final piece of progression (unless you go to the end and start scurrying around the bottom of the end islands, where you will encounter Titanium), However to obtain- to hold Adamantite you must be acknowledged by the lost Souls,
  * And an Orichalcum pickaxe, which is just a little bit of this and that type of travelling around the surface, the ocean and the end to collect the items required for it. Trust me, you wont miss the part of the end if you fly around in the void. (their spawnrate will be lowered if such feedback is given.)
* To complete that process you must Defeat the Coalescence of Souls, summoned in the Nether using the Soul Lantern. However beware the most. This thing is tough, fast, deals high damage and if left alone in the fight will begin hunting down lost souls to heal itself. Therefore its recommended to Bring equally geared Friends. If you dont have that, begin grinding out Enchantment and the Best gear you can get!
    * All other content in the Mod, such as the Blood Moon, Bahamat, Algorythm Matrix, Narchisse and the Demon Queen are almost optional.

</details>
